data.title: Saab reports strong Q3 2025 results, showcasing growth in all areas amid high market demand, upgrading outlook.
data.description: Saab announced their January-September 2025 results, showing strong growth in all business areas in the third quarter. With high market demand, the company upgraded their outlook due to a robust backlog and successful execution. The report indicates positive performance continuing into the year, reflecting promising numbers for the company in 2025.
Wendel's Q3 2025 NAV per share hits €163.0, marking a significant step in its business model shift.
WENDEL: Wendel in talks with Committed Advisors for exclusive partnership, aiming to strengthen their collaboration.

data.title: Sivers Semiconductors AB had a strong Q3 2025 with a new partnership and successful capital raise for R&D. Stock: SIVE.
data.description: A successful quarter was highlighted by a new strategic partnership, key leadership appointments, product expansion, and a prosperous capital raise to support research and market growth. Sivers Semiconductors AB, based in KISTA, Sweden, reported these achievements on Oct. 24, 2025. The company, listed on the Stockholmsborsen exchange under the ticker symbol SIVE, is renowned for its expertise in photonics and wireless technology.

data.title: Altseason potential grows as altcoin season may approach with liquidity moving to risk assets. However, indicators remain low at bear market levels.
data.description: Analysts in the cryptocurrency industry anticipate the onset of the altcoin season as liquidity moves towards higher-risk assets. However, indicators signaling the altseason are currently reported to be at their lowest levels seen in bear markets.

data.title: Custodia Bank and Vantage Bank introduce platform to tokenize deposits, bringing blockchain benefits while securing customer funds.
data.description: Custodia Bank has introduced a new solution allowing banks to tokenize deposits. This initiative enables banks to capitalize on blockchain technology's benefits while securing customer deposits.

data.description: The information provided is not intended for distribution or release in the United States, Canada, Australia, Japan, or any other jurisdiction where it would be unlawful. Additional restrictions apply. Please refer to the important notice at the conclusion of the press release.

data.title: Norsk Hydro reports Q3 2025 adj. EBITDA of NOK 5.996 million, down from NOK 7.367 million in Q3 2024. Free cash flow at NOK 2.2 billion. RoaCE at 11%.
data.description: In the third quarter of 2025, Hydro reported an adjusted EBITDA of NOK 5,996 million, a decrease from NOK 7,367 million in the same period of the previous year. The decline in results was attributed to lower alumina prices and a stronger NOK exchange rate. However, this was somewhat offset by increased primary and alumina volumes, a positive impact from the rising U.S. Midwest premium in Extrusions, and the realization of previously eliminated internal profits. Additionally, Hydro generated NOK 2.2 billion in free cash flow during this period. Their twelve-month adjusted Return on Average Capital Employed (RoaCE) stood at 11 percent.
Company X's Q3 revenue hits EUR 1.4B, operating margin at 9.7%, with free cash flow of EUR 71M.

data.title: Hiab's earnings for the first nine months of 2025 were impacted by reduced sales in the US, leading to a decline in profitability.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. This decrease represents a total of 500,000 individuals who have found jobs in the past month. Additionally, the stock market has seen a 3% increase in value, reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Analysts attribute this growth to optimistic projections for the upcoming fiscal quarter. In other news, the GDP growth rate for the current quarter has been revised to 6.5%, reflecting a stronger economic recovery than initially anticipated. These indicators suggest a positive outlook for the economy in the near future.

data.title: DNO ASA's USD 400 Million Hybrid Bonds to be listed on Oslo Stock Exchange after approval by Norwegian Financial Supervisory Authority. Bonds yield 10.75% and mature in June 2085. Trading expected to start today.
data.description: Oslo, 24 October 2025 - DNO ASA, a Norwegian oil and gas operator, has received approval from the Financial Supervisory Authority of Norway on 23 October 2025 for the prospectus related to their 10.75% USD 400 million subordinated hybrid callable bonds issued on 17 June 2025. These bonds have a maturity date set for June 2085 (ISIN: NO0013582627). Commencing today, the bonds are anticipated to be listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange for trading.

data.title: Bernie Sanders criticizes wealth gap, citing billionaire gains under Trump. Elon Musk $186B richer, Zuckerberg $47B, Bezos $10B.
data.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders criticized the widening wealth gap under President Donald Trump's second term, pointing out the significant surge in the net worth of billionaires like Elon Musk, Mark Zuckerberg, and Jeff Bezos. Sanders highlighted that since Trump's return to office, Musk became $186 billion richer, Zuckerberg $47 billion richer, and Bezos $10 billion richer. He emphasized the stark contrast between the soaring fortunes of Trump's billionaire supporters and the struggles faced by average Americans. Sanders expressed concern over the direction major corporations are heading in, mentioning Jeff Bezos reportedly replacing 600,000 Amazon jobs with robots. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: LEPAS held Fun Test Drive event in WUHU, China on Oct 18-19, following Elegant Driving tour, highlighting user co-creation.
data.description: In Wuhu, China, on October 24, 2025, a successful LEPAS Fun Test Drive event occurred on October 18-19, following the Global Journey of Elegant Driving (China Stop) that ended on October 15. These two events exhibited LEPAS's prowess in various areas.

data.title: Rep. Maxine Waters criticizes Trump for pardoning Binance founder Changpeng Zhao, sparking controversy. #numbers #politics
data.description: The recent pardon by former President Trump of Binance founder Changpeng Zhao has stirred political controversy, sparking renewed examination of his connections to the cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: New games like 'Vampire: The Masquerade — Bloodlines 2' are now available on GeForce NOW, powered by GeForce RTX 5080 for enhanced streaming experience in additional areas.
data.description: The gaming platform, GeForce NOW, has added 'Vampire: The Masquerade — Bloodlines 2' and various other exciting games to its library. Users can now experience top-notch streaming powered by GeForce RTX 5080 in additional regions.

data.title: NHK World airs program on "The Blue Economy in African Nations: Views from Japan." discusses food security, fisheries, and job creation.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, NHK World aired a special program titled "The Blue Economy in African Nations: Views from Japan" in Tokyo. The program discussed various topics such as food security, fisheries modernization, job creation, and resource management. This broadcast aimed to shed light on the importance of promoting sustainable economic development in African nations. This initiative is part of a larger effort to enhance cooperation between Japan and African countries and create opportunities for growth in the region.

data.title: Chinese aid revives Tanzania's Ngorongoro-Lengai Global Geopark with over 50 people witnessing molten lava at 3 am.
data.description: In September 2023, at 3 am, more than 50 individuals hurriedly assembled at the Ol Doinyo Lengai volcano located in the northern section of the Ngorongoro-Lengai Global Geopark in Arusha, Tanzania. They eagerly gathered to witness a spectacular event - molten lava...

data.title: X4 Pharmaceuticals announces $135M public offering of 45.86M shares at $2.90 per share, expected to close on Oct 27.
data.description: X4 Pharmaceuticals has announced the pricing of its underwritten public offering of 45,860,000 shares of common stock at $2.90 per share and pre-funded warrants for 700,000 shares at $2.899 per warrant. The total expected gross proceeds from the offering are approximately $135 million. The offering is set to close on October 27, 2025, with an option for underwriters to purchase an additional 6,984,000 shares within 30 days. All securities are offered by X4 Pharmaceuticals.
